description_long: This is a robust, rectangular safe box with a matte black finish, designed for secure storage in urban environments such as garages, offices, or residential buildings. The front features a prominent electronic locking mechanism with a blue-lit keypad display and two indicator lights, one red and one green, suggesting status feedback. A sturdy, angular handle is mounted beside the keypad, likely for opening the door after unlocking. The door is reinforced and fitted with two large, external hinges on the right side, ensuring durability and resistance to forced entry. The rest of the box is solid and featureless, emphasizing security and tamper resistance. No visible branding, ventilation, or decorative elements are present, giving it a utilitarian and professional appearance.
description: A matte black, rectangular safe box with an electronic keypad, indicator lights, and a robust handle on the reinforced front door. The design is solid, secure, and utilitarian, with external right-side hinges.
description_view_0: The front view shows the electronic keypad with blue illumination, two indicator lights, a sturdy handle, and the reinforced door with visible right-side hinges.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid black surface with the door hinges slightly visible on the far side.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a completely featureless, flat black surface, emphasizing the box's solid construction.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the external hinges in profile, with the rest of the surface remaining plain and unadorned.
attribute_handle_design: angular rotating lever handle, front-mounted, likely metal
